prompt:
Without changing your facial features, create an ultra-realistic macro selfie shot from below to above. The woman holding the camera from below captures the bright summer atmosphere in the frame, along with the sunlight and the cloudless blue sky. A woman looks at the camera with a slight challenge, slightly lifting her chin and tilting her head forward. Her gaze is hidden behind narrow chic pink-brown lensed sunglasses that reflect her surroundings. She has flawless makeup, sun-tanned skin, and dusty pink lips.

On her head, there is a bandana with stylish blue and white patterns that contrasts with the smooth skin of her shoulders and face, creating a relaxed summer style. You can see the straps from her white top. Very long, wet wavy hair. Her right hand is touching her lips, her nails show short square yellow manicure and a large gold ring. The open shadow hat emphasizes the skin texture, while the warm natural light increases the depth and saturation of the colors.

Photorealism, photo taken on iPhone, film grain, no 'staged' feeling, graininess, photo 9:16
